limitations: No quantified dollar amounts or headcount figures tied specifically to AI investment were found in the excerpts; investment intensity scored 3 based on named use cases and a named equity stake (DriveNets) without disclosed AI-specific spend figures.

AI narrative concreteness scored 3 because use cases are named (network design, software development, sales, customer support) but no deployment metrics or quantified outcomes are disclosed; language is partly aspirational.
The DriveNets equity investment ($819M additional investments noted in the table) is not explicitly attributed to AI infrastructure in the excerpts, so it was not included in capex_mentions.

Risk disclosure scored 4 because specific risk mechanisms are described (model errors, IP infringement, regulatory uncertainty, cybercriminal AI use) but no quantified risk exposure or named governance/oversight body is disclosed in the excerpts.
